
### Religion meets Sexual and Gender Minorities

![AP Photo/Charlie Riedel](https://www.poynter.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/AP_19186648808569-2048x1366.jpg)

This page currently details my current and forthcoming research projects related to the overlap of LGBTQ+, BIPOC, and religious communities.

## Current Projects
#### Sexual and Gender Minorities of Color: Who is religious and who is not?


## Forthcoming Projects
#### FAMILY: Fostering Acceptance, Mentoring, Inclusion, and Love for Youth
We are currently in the stages of applying for a grant.
